name: Scholarships
description: Workflow templates for reviewing scholarship requirement, form, upload, review, and support pages.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Find scholarship requirements
workflows.description: A student tries to find eligibility, documents, and deadlines for a scholarship.
required_actions: Find next steps or support contact
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Fill scholarship form
workflows.description: A student tries to complete a scholarship form with permitted test data.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Upload documents
workflows.description: A student tries to find and use document upload controls without exposing private files.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Submit or reach review step
workflows.description: A student tries to move through a permitted application flow until review or confirmation.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Find contact for help
workflows.description: A student tries to locate support contact details for scholarship questions.
required_actions: Identify email, phone, or form option
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
